title: Market data
summary: Crypto market data via OpenBB/Tiingo into a local parquet lake, exportable to the Lean backtester.

secrets.label: Tiingo API key
secrets.hint: tiingo.com → account → API token (free tier works)

notes: Ingested bars persist in the tool's state volume across restarts and rebuilds.
Pairs with the lean tool: data-lake series become backtestable via lean-export.
